# Port target: `@angular-eslint/eslint-plugin`

| | |
|---|---|
| Upstream repo | https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint |
| Submodule | `upstream/angular-eslint` @ `v22.0.0` (`packages/eslint-plugin`) |
| Baseline npm version | `22.0.0` |
| License | MIT |
| Oxlint native support | none — port target |
| Rules to port | 48 |

## Rules

| # | Rule | Description | Docs |
|---|------|-------------|------|
| 1 | `component-class-suffix` | Classes decorated with @Component must have suffix "Component" (or custom) in their name. Note: As of v20, this is no longer recommended by the Angular Team. | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin/docs/rules/component-class-suffix.md) |
| 2 | `component-max-inline-declarations` | Enforces a maximum number of lines in inline template, styles and animations. | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin/docs/rules/component-max-inline-declarations.md) |
| 3 | `component-selector` | Component selectors should follow given naming rules. See more at ${STYLE_GUIDE_LINK}. | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin/docs/rules/component-selector.md) |
| 4 | `computed-must-return` | Ensures that computed() returns a value. Omitting the value is likely a mistake. | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin/docs/rules/computed-must-return.md) |
| 5 | `consistent-component-styles` | Ensures consistent usage of `styles`/`styleUrls`/`styleUrl` within Component metadata | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin/docs/rules/consistent-component-styles.md) |
| 6 | `contextual-decorator` | Ensures that classes use contextual decorators in their body | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin/docs/rules/contextual-decorator.md) |
| 7 | `contextual-lifecycle` | Ensures that lifecycle methods are used in a correct context | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin/docs/rules/contextual-lifecycle.md) |
| 8 | `directive-class-suffix` | Classes decorated with @Directive must have suffix "Directive" (or custom) in their name. Note: As of v20, this is no longer recommended by the Angular Team. | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin/docs/rules/directive-class-suffix.md) |
| 9 | `directive-selector` | Directive selectors should follow given naming rules. See more at https://angular.dev/style-guide#choosing-directive-selectors. | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin/docs/rules/directive-selector.md) |
| 10 | `no-async-lifecycle-method` | Angular Lifecycle methods should not be async. Angular does not wait for async lifecycle but the code incorrectly suggests it does. | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin/docs/rules/no-async-lifecycle-method.md) |
| 11 | `no-attribute-decorator` | The @Attribute decorator is used to obtain a single value for an attribute. This is a much less common use case than getting a stream of values (using @Input), so the @Attribute decorator is often mistakenly used when @Input is intended. This rule disallows the usage of @Attribute decorator entirely to prevent these mistakes. | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin/docs/rules/no-attribute-decorator.md) |
| 12 | `no-developer-preview` | Disallow using code which is marked as developer preview | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin/docs/rules/no-developer-preview.md) |
| 13 | `no-duplicates-in-metadata-arrays` | Ensures that metadata arrays do not contain duplicate entries. | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin/docs/rules/no-duplicates-in-metadata-arrays.md) |
| 14 | `no-empty-lifecycle-method` | Disallows declaring empty lifecycle methods | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin/docs/rules/no-empty-lifecycle-method.md) |
| 15 | `no-experimental` | Disallow using code which is marked as experimental | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin/docs/rules/no-experimental.md) |
| 16 | `no-forward-ref` | Disallows usage of \`${FORWARD_REF}\` references for DI | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin/docs/rules/no-forward-ref.md) |
| 17 | `no-implicit-take-until-destroyed` | Ensures that \`takeUntilDestroyed()\` is called with an explicit \`DestroyRef\` when used outside of an injection context | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin/docs/rules/no-implicit-take-until-destroyed.md) |
| 18 | `no-input-prefix` | Ensures that input bindings, including aliases, are not named or prefixed by the configured disallowed prefixes | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin/docs/rules/no-input-prefix.md) |
| 19 | `no-input-rename` | Ensures that input bindings are not aliased | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin/docs/rules/no-input-rename.md) |
| 20 | `no-inputs-metadata-property` | Disallows usage of the \`${METADATA_PROPERTY_NAME}\` metadata property | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin/docs/rules/no-inputs-metadata-property.md) |
| 21 | `no-lifecycle-call` | Disallows explicit calls to lifecycle methods | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin/docs/rules/no-lifecycle-call.md) |
| 22 | `no-output-native` | Ensures that output bindings, including aliases, are not named as standard DOM events | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin/docs/rules/no-output-native.md) |
| 23 | `no-output-on-prefix` | Ensures that output bindings, including aliases, are not named "on", nor prefixed with it. See more at ${STYLE_GUIDE_LINK} | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin/docs/rules/no-output-on-prefix.md) |
| 24 | `no-output-rename` | Ensures that output bindings are not aliased | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin/docs/rules/no-output-rename.md) |
| 25 | `no-outputs-metadata-property` | Disallows usage of the \`${METADATA_PROPERTY_NAME}\` metadata property | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin/docs/rules/no-outputs-metadata-property.md) |
| 26 | `no-pipe-impure` | Disallows the declaration of impure pipes | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin/docs/rules/no-pipe-impure.md) |
| 27 | `no-queries-metadata-property` | Disallows usage of the \`${METADATA_PROPERTY_NAME}\` metadata property. | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin/docs/rules/no-queries-metadata-property.md) |
| 28 | `no-uncalled-signals` | Warns user about unintentionally doing logic on the signal, rather than the signal's value | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin/docs/rules/no-uncalled-signals.md) |
| 29 | `pipe-prefix` | Enforce consistent prefix for pipes. | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin/docs/rules/pipe-prefix.md) |
| 30 | `prefer-host-metadata-property` | Use `host` metadata property instead of `@HostBinding` and `HostListener` | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin/docs/rules/prefer-host-metadata-property.md) |
| 31 | `prefer-inject` | Prefer using the inject() function over constructor parameter injection | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin/docs/rules/prefer-inject.md) |
| 32 | `prefer-on-push-component-change-detection` | Ensures components do not opt out of the default \`${STRATEGY_ON_PUSH}\` change detection strategy | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin/docs/rules/prefer-on-push-component-change-detection.md) |
| 33 | `prefer-output-emitter-ref` | Use `OutputEmitterRef` instead of `@Output()` | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin/docs/rules/prefer-output-emitter-ref.md) |
| 34 | `prefer-output-readonly` | Prefer to declare `@Output`, `OutputEmitterRef` and `OutputRef` as `readonly` since they are not supposed to be reassigned | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin/docs/rules/prefer-output-readonly.md) |
| 35 | `prefer-signal-model` | Use `model` instead of `input` and `output` for two-way bindings | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin/docs/rules/prefer-signal-model.md) |
| 36 | `prefer-signals` | Use readonly signals instead of `@Input()`, `@ViewChild()` and other legacy decorators | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin/docs/rules/prefer-signals.md) |
| 37 | `prefer-standalone` | Ensures Components, Directives and Pipes do not opt out of standalone. | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin/docs/rules/prefer-standalone.md) |
| 38 | `relative-url-prefix` | The ./ and ../ prefix is standard syntax for relative URLs; don't depend on Angular's current ability to do without that prefix. | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin/docs/rules/relative-url-prefix.md) |
| 39 | `require-lifecycle-on-prototype` | Ensures that lifecycle methods are defined on the object's prototype instead of on an instance. | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin/docs/rules/require-lifecycle-on-prototype.md) |
| 40 | `require-localize-metadata` | Ensures that $localize tagged messages contain helpful metadata to aid with translations. | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin/docs/rules/require-localize-metadata.md) |
| 41 | `runtime-localize` | Ensures that $localize tagged messages can use runtime-loaded translations. | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin/docs/rules/runtime-localize.md) |
| 42 | `sort-keys-in-type-decorator` | Ensures that keys in type decorators (Component, Directive, NgModule, Pipe) are sorted in a consistent order | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin/docs/rules/sort-keys-in-type-decorator.md) |
| 43 | `sort-lifecycle-methods` | Ensures that lifecycle methods are declared in order of execution | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin/docs/rules/sort-lifecycle-methods.md) |
| 44 | `use-component-selector` | Component selector must be declared | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin/docs/rules/use-component-selector.md) |
| 45 | `use-component-view-encapsulation` | Disallows using \`${VIEW_ENCAPSULATION_NONE}\` | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin/docs/rules/use-component-view-encapsulation.md) |
| 46 | `use-injectable-provided-in` | Using the \`${METADATA_PROPERTY_NAME}\` property makes \`Injectables\` tree-shakable | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin/docs/rules/use-injectable-provided-in.md) |
| 47 | `use-lifecycle-interface` | Ensures that classes implement lifecycle interfaces corresponding to the declared lifecycle methods. See more at ${STYLE_GUIDE_LINK} | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin/docs/rules/use-lifecycle-interface.md) |
| 48 | `use-pipe-transform-interface` | Ensures that \`Pipes\` implement \`${PIPE_TRANSFORM}\` interface | [docs](https://github.com/angular-eslint/angular-eslint/blob/main/packages/eslint-plugin/docs/rules/use-pipe-transform-interface.md) |
